red-telephone-keeping-a-human-in-the-loo.description: Stop AI hallucinations. A Human-in-the-Loop MCP server that pauses Agent execution and requests approval via Telegram before sensitive actions. Includes "Approve/Deny" buttons and customisable urgency levels.
